validations.name: input_inventory_completeness
validations.evidence: Both mandatory inputs present and readable. File-level SHA-256 recorded for each. docs/pios/44.2/projection_attachment.json = e580a5ed... docs/pios/43.3/validated_binding_payload.json = 71c628d1...

validations.name: emphasis_field_present_all_records
validations.evidence: All 5 projection records in projection_attachment.json carry emphasis field at projections[].emphasis. No missing field. No null value.

validations.name: emphasis_values_within_closed_set
validations.evidence: All 5 records carry emphasis = 'none'. Closed set: high, medium, low, none. All values within set. No out-of-set value present.

validations.name: emphasis_layer_origin_44x
validations.evidence: Emphasis attribute origin confirmed as 44.3 — Projection Emphasis Attribute, carried by 44.2 — Projection Attachment Contract. Emphasis is NOT present in 43.3 binding records. Governance boundary intact.

validations.name: emphasis_absent_from_binding_records
validations.evidence: docs/pios/43.3/validated_binding_payload.json confirmed to carry no emphasis field in any of 5 binding records. Emphasis is a 44.x-only attribute. Not reconstructed from 43.x.

validations.name: projection_references_valid
validations.evidence: All 5 projection records carry projection_reference = '{binding_id}:VALID:43.31-v1' with correct binding_id substitution. Pattern valid for all 5.

validations.name: no_inference_applied
validations.evidence: All 5 lineage records carry inference_applied = false. No emphasis value inferred at runtime. Values carried verbatim from upstream projection artifact.

validations.name: no_transformation_applied
validations.evidence: All 5 lineage records carry transformation_applied = false. Emphasis values not mapped, normalized, or modified at runtime.

validations.name: no_runtime_computed
validations.evidence: All 5 lineage records carry runtime_computed = false. Emphasis values not derived from signal_state, node properties, or any runtime computation.

validations.name: pass_through_eligible_all_records
validations.evidence: All 5 records carry pass_through = true in attribute_lineage.json. No record fails pass-through eligibility. All conditions satisfied: field present, value in closed set, no inference, no transformation, no runtime computation.

validations.name: no_semantic_extension
validations.evidence: No new semantic fields introduced at exposure layer. No aggregation across records. No cross-record derivation. Exposure records carry only fields verbatim from upstream projection records.

validations.name: exposure_structure_verbatim
validations.evidence: Exposure records carry verbatim: attachment_id, binding_id, signal_id, signal_state, node_id, projection_reference, emphasis. No synthetic fields. No fallback values.

validations.name: deterministic_processing
validations.evidence: Records processed in stable lexicographic order by attachment_id. Identical input files produce identical exposure structure and checksum e6bea5ea...

validations.name: lineage_checksum_valid
validations.evidence: lineage_checksum c374818c... computed as SHA-256 of canonical JSON of lineage records array. Recorded in attribute_lineage.json.

validations.name: exposure_checksum_valid
validations.evidence: exposure_checksum e6bea5ea... computed as SHA-256 of canonical JSON of exposure_records array. Recorded in sample_runtime_output.json.

validations.name: sample_output_labeled_non_canonical
validations.evidence: sample_runtime_output.json carries _label: 'SAMPLE RUNTIME OUTPUT — NON-CANONICAL — VALIDATION ONLY — REMOVABLE' and canonical: false.

validations.name: no_canonical_artifact_produced
validations.evidence: Stream 42.22 produces no canonical artifact. No upstream artifact modified. Execution evidence and non-canonical sample only.

validations.name: no_fail_closed_triggers_fired
validations.evidence: All 8 defined fail-closed conditions monitored and not triggered: emphasis field absent, value outside closed set, value inferred, value transformed, origin outside 44.x, pass-through eligibility failed, upstream checksum mismatch, non-deterministic processing.
